data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Monthly/annual billing with annual discount', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions an annual option with a discount, but there is no concrete evidence of the billing process or how the discount is applied in practice. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary details to confirm the billing structure are missing.
gaps: Lack of evidence demonstrating the implementation of monthly/annual billing with an annual discount.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add billing process validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the billing API supports monthly and annual billing options with applicable discounts.
